title: Enchant Token
description: Enchant Token is a utility mod that removes Minecraft’s default enchantment level cap of 255 and allows enchantments to be applied up to the 32-bit integer limit (2,147,483,647). Using a simple GUI, players can easily enchant any item with any enchant!
body:
Enchant Token is a mod that removes Minecraft’s default enchantment level cap of 255
and allows enchantments to be applied up to the 32-bit integer limit
(2,147,483,647).

The mod provides a simple GUI-based method for applying enchantments at any level
without using commands. To use it, hold an Enchant Token in your off-hand, hold the
item you want to enchant in your main hand, and press the H key to open the
enchantment menu. From there, you can manually enter the enchantment type and
desired level.

Unlike vanilla Minecraft, which strictly limits enchantment levels, Enchant Token
fully bypasses this restriction while keeping enchantments functional at extremely
high values.

This mod is intended for fun use and experimentation in both creative and survival
gameplay. Enchants that go up to 2.147 Billion will not cause any lag to your game, only make a fun experience for you!
